name: Business Credit Keys
description_short: Business Credit Keys offers a structured program to help entrepreneurs build business credit profiles and access up to $50,000 in business credit without personal guarantees or credit checks.
description_long:
Business Credit Keys is an educational and coaching program focused on helping business owners establish and build business credit separate from personal credit. The company markets itself as a hands-on service that guides entrepreneurs through the process of creating a business credit profile from scratch, emphasizing that no personal credit check or existing revenue is required to participate.

The program guides clients through establishing foundational business infrastructure (EIN, business address, domain, incorporation) and then progresses to building business credit through vendor accounts, store cards, merchant cards, and lines of credit. According to their website, participants can reach approximately $50,000 in available business credit within 60-90 days, with some testimonial claims of significantly higher amounts ($68,000-$100,000) achieved in 2-4 months. The service includes access to credit coaches and reportedly provides monthly reporting to major business credit bureaus including Experian, Equifax, LexisNexis, and Dun & Bradstreet.

Business Credit Keys emphasizes personalized coaching and customer service as differentiators, with testimonials highlighting direct access to business credit coaches via text. The company positions itself as educational, stating "Learn From The Experts" as a core value proposition. They promote acquiring business credit lines that do not require personal guarantees, which is a key selling point for entrepreneurs seeking to separate business and personal finances.

While the website presents compelling testimonials and a structured approach, potential customers should note that specific mechanisms for obtaining $50,000 in credit without traditional underwriting, revenue verification, or credit checks are not detailed on the public website. The timeline claims (60-90 days to $50,000 in business credit) and the acquisition of high-limit merchant cards without documented revenue warrant independent verification. This appears to be primarily a coaching and guidance service rather than a direct lender.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No personal credit check required for program participation, making it accessible to those with poor personal credit
Designed specifically for startups and new businesses with no existing revenue
Comprehensive guidance covering full business foundation setup (EIN, incorporation, business bank account, etc.)
Emphasis on separating personal and business finances with no personal guarantees required
Direct access to business credit coaches including personal cell phone contact according to testimonials
Reports to multiple major business credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, LexisNexis, Dun & Bradstreet)
Free eBook and initial consultation available to prospects
cons: Website does not disclose specific pricing or program costs for the coaching service
Specific mechanisms for obtaining $50,000 in business credit without traditional underwriting are not explained on the public site
Testimonials lack verification markers (dates, business types, or independent confirmation)
Timeline claims of 60-90 days to $50,000 in business credit and acquisition of high-limit cards without revenue documentation lack transparency
No information provided about success rates, participant demographics, or realistic expectations for different business types
best_for: New business owners and entrepreneurs seeking to establish business credit separate from personal credit
Self-employed individuals or business owners with poor personal credit who need business financing
Startups with no revenue history or limited operating period looking to access business capital
diagnosis: Business Credit Keys is best for startup entrepreneurs and business owners seeking to build independent business credit quickly without personal credit checks or revenue verification. The primary caveat is that the website does not transparently disclose pricing, specific underwriting mechanisms, or how $50,000 in business credit is obtained without traditional lending requirements—prospective customers should request detailed program information and independently verify timeline and credit access claims before enrollment.
services: Business credit coaching and hands-on guidance
Vendor account establishment (3-5 accounts per program)
Store card acquisition (10-12 cards such as Walmart, Best Buy, Home Depot)
Merchant card acquisition (5-7 high-limit Visa, Amex, Mastercard accounts)
PAYDEX score development and business credit monitoring
Business phone number, address, domain, and website setup
Lines of credit and business loan facilitation
Business credit report monitoring and payment history tracking
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1230 Peachtree St NE 19th floor, Atlanta, GA 30309
